## Checklist

- [ ] `./.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_units.py -q` passes
- [ ] The app still launches (`./.venv/bin/python -m engine`)
- [ ] Added/updated a test for any logic change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] No audio, transcripts, or user data leaves the machine
